历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including old Gaokao science) was approximately 3120 → 2146 → 1914 → 1634 → 1505, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative advancement of about 1615 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 1505 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province for Physics Category was 48 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 39 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 62 students, a significant expansion of about 59% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.
3. [University Level] 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking: 25th in 2021 → 24th in 2022 → 25th in 2023 → 23rd in 2024 → 21st in 2025 → 23rd in 2026, consistently ranking among the top national elite science and engineering universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents (students beaten by local criminal forces, university accused of bias), which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (average evaluation), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious admission gaps recorded. Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 7 A- and above disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors (Aerospace, Computer, Electronic Information, Automation, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other NPU flagship majors are highly recommended in 2024–2026, with sustained high application attention. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province is about 299,000 (slightly up from about 297,000 in 2025). Physics Category candidates, estimated by recent proportion, are about 207,000, with a slightly expanded competition base. In 2026, Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a university within Guizhou Province, so there is no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment distribution across provinces is relatively balanced, and Guizhou is a central-western source province with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (increased competition) and the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (reduced competition), but given NPU's top 985 level, extremely high social popularity of its flagship majors, and a slight increase in the total number of Guizhou candidates, actual competition will not be completely diluted by the pure expansion ratio. After moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1988, with a range of 1688–2288.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category enrollment expands significantly by about 59%, with an estimated minimum admission ranking of about 1988, range 1688–2288. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (1688) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Top-Notch Class, Huang Yushan Aviation Class, Smart Three-Aerospace Class). Candidates with rankings in the middle range (about 1900–2100) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 (Electronic Information, Aerospace directions, Automation), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper limit (2288) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety, prioritizing basic disciplines like Mathematics and Physics, and cautiously applying for Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including old Gaokao liberal arts) was approximately 794 → 1206 → 1124 → 1281 → 1342, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 548 places in the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 1342 places; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 2 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 7 students from 2024 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 7 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked stably in the Top 25 on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, belonging to the top national universities, but with few History Category majors and not its advantageous direction; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incident), with average Douyin popularity; History Category majors (Economics and Trade, Business Administration) are not the university's core strengths, less affected by reputation fluctuations; NPU's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Aeronautics and Astronautics A+, Computer Science A+, Materials A+, etc.), while History Category majors (Economics, Law, Business Administration) have no corresponding A-class discipline evaluations, with weak disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Economics and Trade (including International Economics and Trade, Law, Administrative Management), Law has high social popularity but with differentiation and wait-and-see attitude, Economics class is differentiated and wait-and-see; Business Administration has obvious social discouragement; Guizhou Province's 2026 History Category candidates are estimated at about 90,000 based on recent years' proportions, basically unchanged from 2025 (90,000); 2026; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university; History Category enrollment plan is very small (only 7 students), with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: History Category enrollment plan has been unchanged for two consecutive years (7 students), with historical rankings showing a slow backward trend; considering the extremely small enrollment scale, no expansion stimulus, and differentiated major popularity (Law is relatively hot but Business Administration is discouraged), it is expected that the 2026 ranking will be slightly backward compared to the 2025 baseline (slightly intensified competition), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1355, range 1153–1557.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the History Category enrollment plan is unchanged from 2025 (7 students), with a predicted minimum admission ranking of about 1355, range 1153–1557. History Category has only 2 majors; candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1140) can aim for Economics and Trade (including Law direction); those in the middle to back of the range are advised to use Business Administration as a safety. Given NPU's strength in engineering and weak disciplinary support for History Category, candidates should weigh their own interests and employment expectations comprehensively.
